cart.remove_confirm_desc: The product will be removed from the cart.
cart.insufficient_stock_desc: Unable to add more units. You already have {{qty}} in cart. Available stock: {{stock}}
cart.price_below_cost_desc: The discount results in a price ({{price}}) lower than cost ({{cost}}). Operation not permitted.

messages.no_register_assigned: NO CASH REGISTER ASSIGNED. PLEASE CONTACT THE ADMINISTRATOR.
messages.admin_mode_info: Operating in Admin Mode (No active cash session).
messages.welcome_cash_count: Hello {{name}}, you must perform the Opening Cash Count before processing sales.

messages.select_register_desc: Choose the register you will be operating today.
messages.closure_requested: A shift closure has been requested. Please wait for the administrator to authorize your cash count to continue or exit.

company.title: Company Settings
company.page_subtitle: Manage your company branding, legal identification, and accounting rigour.
company.name: Company Name
company.logo_recommendation: Recommendation: Use a square image (aspect ratio 1:1) for optimal circular display on receipts and reports.
company.mandatory_bank_help: When enabled, staff will be forced to select an specific bank account or cash drawer when recording Expenses or paying Suppliers.

messages.logo_loaded: Logo loaded. Save changes to apply.

general.page_subtitle: Fine-tune POS behavior, tax calculations, and exchange rate automation.
general.secondary_display_desc: Select the default secondary currency to be displayed in the Point of Sale (POS) for reference pricing.
general.preferred_secondary_extra: This currency will be shown alongside the primary currency in the product grid and POS cart.
general.rate_automation_desc: Enable this to automatically update exchange rates from external providers (e.g., Binance P2P).
general.tax_config_desc: Enable this to calculate value-added tax in the Point of Sale (POS) and Price Checker.
general.rounding_config_desc: Determine if POS prices should be rounded and by what factor.
general.rounding_factor_extra: Final prices will be rounded UP to the nearest multiple of this value.
general.igtf_config_desc: Enable this if your business is a Special Taxpayer and must collect the 3% tax for payments in foreign currencies.
general.fiscal_status_desc: Enable this if your company has been designated as a 'Special Taxpayer'. This enables retention workflows.
general.special_taxpayer_extra: When enabled, the system will allow generating tax retention certificates.

network.page_subtitle: Configure how this frontend application communicates with the central MastERP core server.
network.local_msg_desc: Use this if you are running both the database/server and this interface on the same computer.
network.lan_msg_desc: Enable this mode to allow other devices (smartphones, tablets) on your same Wi-Fi to connect.
network.lan_ip_desc: The application will attempt to reach the backend at this internal address.
network.remote_msg_desc: Enter the full URL of your publicly hosted API (e.g., https://api.yourdomain.com/api).
network.external_desc: To access MastERP from another device in the same building, open the browser and enter:
network.success_mode_local: Mode switched to Local Host. The application will restart.
network.success_mode_lan: Mode switched to Local Network (LAN). The application will restart.
network.success_mode_remote: Mode switched to Remote/Cloud. The application will restart.
network.error_lan_ip: Could not automatically detect the server's local IP.
network.error_remote_url: Please enter a valid URL for Remote mode.

form.name: Currency Name
form.is_primary_desc: The primary currency serves as the base for all exchange rates
form.is_primary_alert: This currency will be marked as primary
form.is_primary_alert_desc: If another primary currency exists, it will be automatically unmasked.
form.rate_help: How many units of the primary currency equal 1 unit of this currency? e.g., 1 USD = 100 Bs

products.import_price_content: The currency, cost, and sales prices from "{{name}}" will be copied. Current values will be overwritten.
products.import_similar_tooltip: Search an existing product to copy its price and currency configuration
products.primary_to_secondary_desc: The Secondary Unit (e.g., Box) contains multiple Primary Units.
products.secondary_to_primary_desc: The Primary Unit (e.g., Roll) contains multiple Secondary Units.
products.composed_recipe_alert: Cost and stock will be automatically calculated based on the added components.

price_checker.search_placeholder: Scan barcode or type product name...
price_checker.no_products: No products found matching your search

hero.title: Elevate your business with intelligence
hero.subtitle: The cloud ERP that helps you manage inventory, sales and growth with AI.

multi_currency.title: 100% Multi-currency POS
multi_currency.desc: Charge in local and foreign currencies on the same invoice. The system instantly recalculates change and equivalencies based on real-time rates.

mercadolibre.title: Mercado Libre Integration
mercadolibre.desc: Sell in-store and publish on Mercado Libre simultaneously. Keep your inventory perfectly synced across all physical and digital channels.

hr.title: Integrated HR & Payroll
hr.desc: Manage employee profiles, set base salaries, and generate fortnightly payroll with just two clicks. Automated digital payslips.

analytics.title: Inflation-Adjusted Metrics
analytics.desc: Our reports use historical exchange rates to isolate inflation, revealing true business growth and accurate year-end inventory projections.

footer.mission: Built with state-of-the-art technology to empower merchants and defeat economic instability.

auth.title: Sign in to manage your business
auth.error_network: Could not connect to server. Please check your network settings.
auth.error_server: A server error occurred while logging in.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Control system access levels and security permissions.
users.delete_content: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
users.name: Full Name

liquidate.title: Confirm POS Batch Liquidation
liquidate.process_desc: Confirming this will move the in-transit balance to the real account balance. An automatic expense will be recorded for the bank commission.
liquidate.commission_help: This amount will be subtracted from the total and recorded as an Expense.

pos_settings.liquidation_desc: If enabled, card payments from the POS will be sent to this account as In Transit Balance.
pos_settings.mobile_desc: Enable to receive mobile payments (Pago Móvil) in the POS.

inventory.title: Inventory Report
inventory.forecast_desc: Products that will soon be out of stock according to actual sales rate
inventory.needed_6m_tooltip: Estimated units needed for the next 6 months based on recent sales trends

clients.search_placeholder: Search by name, ID/RIF or email

clients.whatsapp_msg: Hello {{name}}, we are contacting you from MastERP...

adjustments.title: Inventory Adjustments
adjustments.insufficient_desc: Unable to decrease {{quantity}} units. Available stock: {{stock}}

sales_history.title: 📜 Sales History & Audit
sales_history.reports_subtitle: Visualize and analyze your sales performance

guide.title: Returns and Inflation Adjustment Guide
guide.nominal_desc: Real Nominal Revenue is the exact amount collected on the day of sale.
guide.refund_warning: Use the 'Paid Amt' data for refunds.
guide.adjusted_desc: Adjusted Gross Revenue revalues historical sales to today's rate for inflation-adjusted growth analysis.

messages.delete_confirm_content: This action will void invoice {{invoice}}, restore product stock, and if it was the last sale, allow the invoice number to be reused.
messages.select_new_method: Select the new payment method for invoice {{invoice}}:
messages.edit_payment_note: Note: This action only updates the reporting label. The original cash register movements will not be automatically updated.

modal.balance_paid: Balance to be paid by Customer:

messages.approve_content: The request will be marked as approved and ready for final processing.
messages.reject_prompt: Please enter the reason for rejection:
messages.process_content: This will update the inventory stock and finalize the refund/exchange.
messages.warning_old_invoice: This invoice is over 30 days old. Check return policy eligibility.
messages.error_select_item: Please select at least one item to return

modal.agreed_rate_help: Value of 1 {{currency}} agreed for this payment

messages.calc_error: Error calculating conversion. Please check the exchange rate.

messages.exceeds_balance: Retention amount exceeds pending invoice balance.

list.title: Tax Retentions Control
list.delete_content: The associated payment will be reverted and the pending balance will be restored.

messages.delete_payment_content: This action will revert the invoice balance and cannot be undone.
messages.bad_debt_content_1: This action will remove the sale and associated debt from the books.
messages.bad_debt_content_2: ⚠️ INVENTORY STOCK WILL NOT BE RESTORED
messages.bad_debt_content_3: Use only if the customer took the goods and will not pay (Loss/Theft).

expenses.bank_account_placeholder: Select bank account (Transfers, Pago Móvil, etc.)

cash_register.usd_rate_warning: No exchange rate found for USD. Using 0.
cash_register.close_request_desc: The cashier has completed the count and requests to close the session. Review the amounts before authorizing.

marketing.title: Marketing & Loyalty Configuration
marketing.subtitle: Define how the system segments your audience and rewards customer loyalty.
marketing.segmentation_desc: Set the minimum cumulative spend (in USD equivalent) required for each loyalty tier. These values dynamically update the Marketing Dashboard analytics.
marketing.vip_tooltip: Minimum lifetime spend to reach Diamond status
marketing.churn_tooltip: Days without a purchase before a customer is flagged as 'Inactive' or at risk of churn.
marketing.earning_tooltip: The amount of points a customer earns for every $1 spent (or local currency equivalent).
marketing.point_value_tooltip: The monetary value of a single point when redeemed at checkout.
marketing.max_redemption_tooltip: Maximum percentage of the transaction total that can be paid using points.
marketing.mechanics_desc: Points are calculated automatically during each checkout session. Cashiers can apply accumulated points as a payment method based on the conversion values defined above.

dashboard.wa_birthday_msg: 🎂 Happy Birthday, {{name}}! Wishing you a wonderful day. As a valued customer, we have a special surprise waiting for you!

campaigns.campaigns_subtitle: Reach your customers directly through personalized messaging.
campaigns.instructions_desc: Click 'Open WhatsApp' to launch the chat with the personalized message. After sending, click 'Mark as Sent' to update the progress tracker.
campaigns.template_variable_hint: The system will automatically replace template variables (e.g., {name}) for each customer in this segment.

social.social_subtitle: Create persuasive social media content in seconds using AI.
social.instructions_placeholder: e.g., Use a funny tone, highlight limited stock, mention the crazy weekend deal...
social.fb_copy_info: Text copied. You can now paste it into your Facebook post.
social.error_generate: Failed to generate post with AI

templates.title: Message Templates
templates.subtitle: Create reusable message structures for your marketing campaigns.
templates.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. Past campaigns will not be affected.
templates.content_placeholder: Hi {name}! Since you are a {tier} customer, we have a special gift for you...
templates.content_tooltip: Use curly braces for dynamic variables: {name}, {tier}, and {points}

coupons.title: Promotional Coupon Codes
coupons.subtitle: Manage marketing campaigns and discount codes.

modal.description_placeholder: Example: Holiday season flash sale promotion.
modal.single_use_tooltip: Prevents a single customer from using this code multiple times.
modal.target_tiers_tooltip: If empty, the coupon applies to all customer tiers.
modal.department_tooltip: If empty, it applies to the entire store inventory.

messages.delete_error: Error deleting coupon. It may have historical usage data.

purchases.subtitle: Inventory entry management and purchase history.

purchase_orders.no_phone: Supplier has no phone number registered

payroll.date_range_error: Please select start and end dates
payroll.info_desc: This will automatically generate payslips for all active employees in the selected group. For Biweekly payrolls, it typically calculates 50% of the monthly base salary.
payroll.title: Payroll History

detail.period_subtitle: Payroll detail for the selected period

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence Hub
ai.subtitle: Configure the AI providers that power MastERP's intelligent features. These credentials are used for financial forecasting, marketing copy generation, and real-time business insights.
ai.gemini_desc: Gemini is the primary engine driving the Social Hub and Business Intelligence modules.
ai.get_api_key: Get Free API Key at Google AI Studio
ai.api_key_tooltip: Your private Google AI Studio key. Keep this secure.
ai.api_key_required: API Key is required to enable AI features
ai.model_tooltip: We recommend gemini-1.5-flash for its optimal balance of speed, performance, and low cost.
ai.enable_provider: Enable this provider across the system
ai.future_support: Future support for OpenAI (GPT-4o) and Meta Llama 3 is coming soon.
